_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data and AI strategy development approaches, including strategy formulation methods, alignment with enterprise business strategy, competitive positioning through data capabilities, and strategy communication frameworks.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-007 (LS, cosine: 0.468), RM-S-008 (RM, cosine: 0.445).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.6/10 (raw 0.260). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, methods]. DCWF-only terms [exploitation] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, alignment, approaches, business, capabilities, communication] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.897 (P=0.939, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.082 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Knowledge of exploitation methods." and "Knowledge of data and AI strategy development approaches, including strategy for" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.488 > STS 0.260 (gap +0.229). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, methods] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, methods]. DCWF-only: [exploitation]. WIDAI-only: [ai, alignment, approaches, business, capabilities, communication].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.229 with low STS 0.260. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
